column6: A snake-tossing cryptic adventure. Visuals that remind you of schooltime spent in computer lab. The snakes will not tolerate failure.

column13: Z. Bill comes to games from comic books, and has been splicing up these 2 media in bizarre ways for most of the millennium thus far.

column6: Sun Blocks is a mobile puzzle game where you drag blocks to guide the Sunlight to Flowers in the least moves possible. With 9 different mechanics, over 150 levels, achievements, and unlimited daily levels.
column13: I'm a solo developer making my first game! I've worked in software at Amazon and Uber but never a game like this before.

column6: FORBIDDEN SIGHT is a 4-player online co-op survival and stealth horror. Survive the Human Archive Museum (H.A.M)'s security system as you steal artifacts from different eras of human history, using electromagnetic waves to navigate through your heist.
column13: We are a team of college student and recent graduates making our own games.

column6: A unique and easy to pick up trading card game in its early beta. We are very small company (2-3 people) so any criticism would be helpful. Thanks!

column13: We are a team made almost entirely out of kids going into high school. This game has been a passion project for a couple months now, so it means a lot that you checked it out. Thank you!!!!!
